name: Muffins, Blueberry
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, cream the sugar, oil and zest until well combined.
3. Add the Egg Beaters and beaten egg whites, mixing completely.
4. Incorporate the fat free blend, vanilla, and lemon juice.
5. Gradually add the flour and baking powder, stirring until fully blended.
6. Carefully incorporate the blueberries, gently mixing until evenly distributed—avoid overmixing to prevent breaking the berries.
7. Line muffin cups with paper liners and fill each 3/4 full with batter.
8. Bake for 25 minutes.
